VOUCHERTYPE.NAME: DELIVERY CHALLAN
VOUCHERTYPE.VCHPRINTDECL: We declare that this invoice shows the actual price of the goods described and that all particulars are true and correct.

VOUCHERTYPE.NAME: Sales
VOUCHERTYPE.VCHPRINTDECL: I/We hereby certify that my/ our registration certificate under the GST Act ,2017 is in force on the date on which the sale of the goods specified in this Tax Invoice is made by me / us and that the transaction of sales covered by this Tax Invoice has been effected by me/ us and that the transaction of sales covered by this Tax Invoice has been effected by me/us. and it shall be accounted for in the turnover of sales while filling of return and the due tax,if any,payable on the sale has been paid

UDF:_UDF_788552253.LIST.UDF:_UDF_788552253: 1] Godds once sold will not be taken back. 2] Payment should be made by A/c Payee cheque only. 3] Error & Ommision excepted. 4] If bill is not paid on due date,interest @21% p.a. will be charged. 5] Our responsibillity ceases after goods leaves our godown/shop.

VOUCHERTYPE.NAME: Sales GST
VOUCHERTYPE.VCHPRINTDECL: We declare that this invoice shows the actual price of the goods described and that all particulars are true and correct.
VOUCHERTYPE.PREVNARRATION: 3-3.5 hours time taken to unload the vehicle.
